ddls:
CREATE TABLE "athletes" (
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each athlete */,
  "athlete_name" TEXT /* Full name of the athlete */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year of the athlete (e.g., SR, JR, SO, FR) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the athlete belongs to */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the athlete */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the athlete */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the athlete */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the athlete */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* Profile picture of the athlete */,
  "personal_best_5k" REAL /* Personal best 5K time of the athlete */,
  "personal_best_10k" REAL /* Personal best 10K time of the athlete */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athletes_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "school" TEXT /* School the team represents */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's coach */,
  "mascot" TEXT /* Mascot of the team */,
  "colors" TEXT /* Colors of the team */,
  "logo" TEXT /* Logo of the team */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the team */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the team */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "race_results" (
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race result */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the athlete who participated in the race */,
  "race_date" TEXT /* Date of the race */,
  "race_location" TEXT /* Location where the race took place */,
  "avg_mile" REAL /* Average mile time for the race */,
  "total_time" REAL /* Total time taken to complete the race */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score achieved in the race */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance of the race */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the race */,
  "course_difficulty" TEXT /* Difficulty of the course */,
  "finish_time" REAL /* Finish time of the athlete */,
  "pace" REAL /* Pace of the athlete */,
  "place" INTEGER /* Place of the athlete in the race */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_results_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment" (
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of equipment */,
  "equipment_name" TEXT /* Name of the equipment */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the equipment available */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team that uses the equipment */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the equipment */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the equipment */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the equipment was purchased */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition of the equipment */,
  "maintenance_history" TEXT /* Maintenance history of the equipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_equipment_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the event is held */,
  "organizing_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team organizing the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., cross-country, track and field) */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance of the event */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_organizing_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("organizing_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "athlete_equipment" (
  "athlete_equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each athlete-equipment association */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the athlete using the equipment */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the equipment being used */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the athlete started using the equipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("athlete_equipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athlete_equipment_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athlete_equipment_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_participants" (
  "event_participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event-participant association */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event the athlete is participating in */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the athlete participating in the event */,
  "finish_time" REAL /* Finish time of the athlete in the event */,
  "pace" REAL /* Pace of the athlete in the event */,
  "place" INTEGER /* Place of the athlete in the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_participants_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_participants_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_goals" (
  "goal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance goal */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the athlete the goal is set for */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the goal is set for */,
  "goal_type" TEXT /* Type of goal (e.g., individual, team) */,
  "target_score" INTEGER /* Target score to achieve */,
  "target_date" TEXT /* Target date to achieve the goal by */,
  "target_pace" REAL /* Target pace to achieve */,
  "target_finish_time" REAL /* Target finish time to achieve */,
  "progress" TEXT /* Progress towards the goal */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the goal (e.g., met, not met) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("goal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_goals_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_goals_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "communications" (
  "communication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each communication */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the communication is for */,
  "communication_type" TEXT /* Type of communication (e.g., announcement, message) */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the communication */,
  "date_sent" TEXT /* Date the communication was sent */,
  "subject" TEXT /* Subject of the communication */,
  "sender" TEXT /* Sender of the communication */,
  "attachments" TEXT /* Attachments sent with the communication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("communication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_communications_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
